name: Chicken Enchilada Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Four Ounces Green chilies, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion, green bell pepper, and garlic in melted butter until softened.
2. Add the cubed cooked chicken, beans, and green chili peppers to the skillet. Mix well.
3. Set aside the mixture.
4. In another bowl, mix flour with the remaining butter until smooth.
5. Gradually stir in the chicken broth and 1 cup of shredded Monterey Jack cheese until combined.
6. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens and begins to simmer.
7. Remove from heat and dip each corn tortilla into the hot sauce to soften slightly.
8. Fill each tortilla with about two heaping tablespoons of the chicken mixture.
9. Roll up each tortilla tightly.
10. Arrange the rolled tortillas in a 9-by-13-inch baking dish, seam side down.
11. Pour the remaining sauce over the rolls and sprinkle with any leftover cheese.
12. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until heated through.
